---
title: "About Me"
pagetitle: "About"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 100px
      body-width: 1050px
      margin-width: 200px
      gutter-width: 2em
    css: css/reset-padding.css
about:
    template: trestles
    id: above-content
    image: images/placeholder.png
    # image-shape: rectangle, round, rounded
    links:
      - icon: github
        text: "GitHub"
        href: "https://github.com/neuroshepherd"
      - text: |
          <i class="fa-brands fa-orcid" style="color: #A6CE39;"></i>
          ORCID
        href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1769-7580"

---


::: {.dark-content}

Hello there, dark-mode user.

:::
